title: Display date over two different years
excerpt:
Dear Support, 
I have the date set up in DD MMM YYYY on my profile. 
when we enter a date (or a period) in the actual year the date is display like this: 
DD MMMM. 
exemple: 
13 sept. 
When we enter it over 2 years it is …

posts.author: Joachim (Dessus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear Support,
I have the date set up in DD MMM YYYY on my profile.
when we enter a date (or a period) in the actual year the date is display like this:
DD MMMM.
exemple:
13 sept.
When we enter it over 2 years it is
MMMM. DD, 'YY - MMMM. DD, 'YY
exemple:
déc. 25, '23 - janv. 02, '24

It is frustrating to have format mixed.
Couldn’t we have 25 déc., '23 - 02 janv., '24 ?
